name: the-aid-2-times-monorepo
description: Monorepo for THE AID 2 TIMES - Frontend, Backend, and Supabase

scripts.dev: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install

author: vroom0456
